entry.title: Error retrieving edmx for [destination] - Fiori Project in Eclipse to BAS (ABAP Cloud)
entry.content:
Hello.

I am trying the 'Create Fiori Project' functionality from the Service Binding (ABAP Cloud) in Eclipse. But when the Business Application Studio opens, I get the error:

"Error retrieving edmx for [s4h]. Unable to launch the Fiori generator from ADT. Check output logs [SAP Fiori Tools - Application Modeler] for more information."

What am I missing? My settings are as following.

Service Binding:

Eclipse external IDE configuration:

SAP Destination:

Error BAS:

SAP BTP, ABAP environment SAP Business Application Studio

entry.title: Re: Service Call Status History for KPI reporting
entry.content: Hi SonTran. That works! And so simple. Thank you so very much.

entry.title: Customer & Partner Roundtable for SAP BTP ABAP Environment #21
entry.content:
👉 The call for contributions for one of the upcoming roundtables is open! 

 

If you want to show a demo or share a use case scenario for SAP BTP ABAP Environment send us an email and we will get back to you.
 

Introduction

 

As SAP BTP ABAP environment (aka Steampunk) and ABAP Cloud became more popular inside and outside of SAP, there is a high demand for rolling out the latest product news and updates, asking questions, and showing demos. 

💡 You can find the slides presented, recordings, and further references from the previous roundtables in this GitHub repository.


Meeting Information

When:                                                                      
  • March 18th, 10:00 - 11:00 AM CET  – Zoom Meeting (please register in advance) 
 
Who:
  • All interested customers, partners, and stakeholders are invited to join this roundtable
  • BTP ABAP team:
    • Frank Jentsch (Product Lead for SAP BTP ABAP Environment)
    • Iwona Hahn (BTP ABAP Product Management)
  • Partner rps GmbH:
    • Hans-Georg Lill, Martin Rau, Mark Lohmüller, Jerónimo Fernández Gersol 
Preliminary Agenda:
  • Product update for SAP BTP ABAP Environment
  • “rps Agreement Management” Partner Solution on SAP BTP incl. live demo
  • Q&A 
Looking forward to meeting you!
 


Check out our SAP Business Technology ABAP Environment page in SAP Community for product updates and upcoming events.

entry.title: Re: Fiori add APP Purchasing Requisition average approval...
entry.content:
Hello,

First you need to activate the APP, please find the below screenshot and share with your Basis guy to activate.

 

Thanks,

Sanan

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to do a goods receipt of Purchase orde...
entry.content:
Yes! Well, it depends what version you are on. This is called Synchronous Goods Receipt. You can post GR directly from a Purchase Order into EWM. You can post GR directly from MIGO, you should see a 'Warehouse Management' Tab pop up when you can specify the receiving storage bin. (This can be adjusted through config). See below blog post for help setting this up,

https://community.sap.com/t5/supply-chain-management-blogs-by-members/synchronous-goods-receipts-in-ewm-for-external-procurement-po-based-with/ba-p/13515822

entry.title: Re: How SAP B1 specifically in picking module create information from "bin location allocation
entry.content:
You have to search for documents with open quantity holding the item. This can be done search the transaction log tables (OITL and OBTL).

Here is an example for sales orders. You will have to adapt the query to search all open sales orders for the item that are holding its quantity.

SELECT OBTL."BinAbs" AS "BinAbsEntry",

OBTL."Quantity"

FROM OITL

INNER JOIN OBTL ON OBTL."ITLEntry" = OITL."LogEntry"

WHERE OITL."DocType" = 17

AND OITL."DocEntry" = 9999999

entry.title: Re: Fiori add APP Purchasing Requisition average approval...
entry.content: May I know which menu to activate this app pls? or if i assigned role SAP_BR_PURCHASER to my user in SU01 will it work?

entry.title: Consumption Unit (CU) Status
entry.content:
Hello,

Can we have a summary of the Consumption Unit we have for each environment?

I do not know if possible to have the Initial value and the usage for each environment, it will be useful to understand if we did the estimation correctly.

Thanks.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Consumption Unit (CU) Status
entry.content:
Hello,

You can find the environment setup in the following areas on the Environment page on the Cloud Portal and on Dynatrace:

  • Scaling Configuration (Cloud Portal)
  • Hosts (Dynatrace)

    See below for more details where to find the configurations:
  1. Cloud Portal > Environment > Scaling Configuration: Displays database type and performance, database storage size, VM Type and maximum number of VMs.
  2. Dynatrace > Infrastructure Observability > Hosts: Displays number of VMs deployed in the non-production environment.

More details you can find in the SAP Community How to estimate the capacity unit with Commerce Cloud Capacity Unit Estimator

Also in SAP KBA: 3523183 - How to estimate Capacity Units with Capacity Unit Estimator - Commerce Cloud

Thank you!
Sabrina
SAP Support

entry.title: BAPI for GJF2 and GJG2 ?
entry.content:
Hi Experts 

Are there any BAPI available for T codes  GJF2 and GJG2 ?

entry.title: Re: Fiori add APP Purchasing Requisition average approval...
entry.content: Here is the link to activate the APP: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/activation-of-standard-fiori-apps/ba-p/13562923

entry.title: Standard System T-Codes run slowly
entry.content: Hi all, The customer has SAP 2023. After 2023 upgrade, when add equipments standard tcodes (IW31, IW32,IW41,IW42IW38 etc.), system run too slow. When I checked ST12, the problem due to database. I shared systems result. Also I compare two tables. IFLOT and IFLOT_HIER. IF I add a FL IFLOT_HIER, system run normal. How can update this table? This method solved the problem, but I am not sure this is exact solution. Also I checked with Z structure, and Z tables, There is no problem in the system in these structures.

entry.title: Re: Managing Pay Scale Progression based on Age (or) Service Period
entry.content: Thanks for sharing Narendra. Have you ever try as well progration to be based on if service period together with an additional dymention if the person has already experiance in predefine business function?

entry.title: Notas SAP para a Reforma Tributária
entry.content:
Olá, pessoal!

Alguém já aplicou as notas SAP liberadas para a reforma tributária? 

Encontraram algum problema? Tive um problema em relação ao SP de um cliente, inicialmente nao conseguimos aplicar as notas, mas depois conseguimos. 

Logo apos, a SAP lançou uma nota falando sobre o mínimo de SP para aplicação de notas para a reforma tributária. Será que quem não fizer a atualização terá problemas nas futuras notas?

entry.title: Re: Is SYBASE Mainframe Connect v15 compatible with CICS...
entry.content: I can't access PAM weblink in this issue - Is the product compatible with Z/OS Version 3.1?

entry.title: Re: Advanced Intercompany Sales & Stock Transfer in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content: SAP Note 3298560 mentiones multiple times that for IC STO to be created, SO item delivery plant should have confirmed Q-ty. In our business case we need to raise a demand in delivering plant based on IC STO requirement and only after demand will be fiullfield stock will be available. Is that possible to achieve with any workaround?

entry.title: How to activate "Automatic Deallocation" setting in the contract item category for purchase contract
entry.content:
Hi All,

Please advise how to activate the "Automatic Deallocation" setting in the contract item category for the purchase contract and help with the configuration steps.

Once you have created a contract and release order, then you decrease the quantity on the release order or delete the release order. quantity deleted/decreased should not go back to the contract.

Thanks,

Hems

entry.title: Re: date of birth Year is to be Hidden

entry.title: SAP Hana Model Management log Location
entry.content:
Hi,

We are having problems importing models into SAP into production, it worked in test.   The test database is a couple of months old, but not much has changed in production.  I don't know if this matters, but when importing into test, there were no other users in the system.  When importing into live, there were other users in.

The error is not clear at all, doesn't tell what the problem is.

Does anyone know where the logs are located in the backend?

Any help is appreciated.


Brian Branco

entry.title: Re: date of birth Year is to be Hidden
entry.content: We had to use an addendum to Context.CurrentUser not = to Login User() and block any other groups w permission to that area.

entry.title: Re: Constraint net cannot be deleted (PMEVC)
entry.content:
Hello @MEntrup 

 

In S/4HANA Cloud we have the API  api_varconfignconstraintnet which has an Entity VarCnfConstraintNet

that supports deletion.

Information at the resource Information at the resource Delete Constraint Nets

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: date of birth Year is to be Hidden
entry.content: This allows our designated HR users to see specific demographic perms allowances, and emp on self but no others.

entry.title: Re: date of birth Year is to be Hidden
entry.content: Thank you! This helps. I tried using permission group here and doesn't seem to work.

entry.title: Re: SAP Multibank Connectivity Integration: BASIS Perspective
entry.content:
Hi Guys,.

I have question around 

  1. Export the SSL Client Standard Certificate (own-certificate) and get it CA signed by SAP-trusted CA.

Regards

Rohit

entry.title: Re: Database Migration Option (DMO) of SUM - Introduction
entry.content:
Dear Boris,

     As other SAP migration tools are rolled out like SAP Business Transformation Center (BTC) and SAP Selective Data Transition (SDT), can you clarify those SAP offerings versus SUM DMO? Are they alternatives to SUM DMO or in addition to SUM DMO? SUM DMO can also handle a Unicode Conversion. If a Unicode Conversion still needs to be performed for an SAP Landscape, is it possible to directly use SAP BTC or SAP SDT to an SAP HANA DB or is it best or required to do a Unicode Conversion first via SUM DMO or other SAP option? SAP BTC and SAP SDT do not clearly cover or mention SUM or SUM DMO as a prerequisite for using those new Cloud Tools for migration to S/4 HANA. If I should ask my questions elsewhere, I believe that you will tell me. :))

Best regards,

Morris

entry.title: Re: Restrict compensation worksheet template for specific...
entry.content:

My understanding is that you can restrict permission to the Design Worksheet page all together through RBP but not specific components of this page.

Thanks,

Christian

entry.title: Re: Display values from one object in separate columns
entry.content:
Thank you! With a little help from Google Gemini I was able to create the right variable and add them to the report. Sharing the query from Google Gemini is anyone is interested. 

------Google Gemini

You're encountering a common issue when dealing with related data in Web Intelligence. The multiple rows are appearing because the report is showing each combination of employee and phone type. Here's how you can separate the phone numbers into different columns:

1. Using IF conditions in Derived Measures (Recommended):

This is the most straightforward and generally preferred method. You'll create new measures for each phone type (e.g., "Home Phone," "Mobile Phone," "Work Phone").

  • Create Derived Measures: In your report, create new derived measures using the IF function (or CASE statement if your version supports it). Here's an example:

    Home Phone = IF [Phone Type Code] = "HOME" THEN [Phone Number] ELSE ""
Mobile Phone = IF [Phone Type Code] = "MOBILE" THEN [Phone Number] ELSE ""
Work Phone = IF [Phone Type Code] = "WORK" THEN [Phone Number] ELSE ""
    • Explanation: These formulas check the [Phone Type Code] for each row. If it matches the specified type (e.g., "HOME"), it returns the corresponding [Phone Number]. Otherwise, it returns an empty string (""). This prevents the creation of extra rows.

  • Add Measures to Report: Add the newly created derived measures ("Home Phone," "Mobile Phone," "Work Phone") to your report. Now, each employee will have their phone numbers displayed in separate columns, one for each phone type.

2. Using a Crosstab (Alternative if you have many Phone Types):

If you have a large number of phone types, creating individual measures for each might become cumbersome. A crosstab can be more efficient in this situation.

  • Add Objects to Crosstab: Add the [Phone Type Code] as the "Columns" in the crosstab and the [Phone Number] as the "Values." Place the employee identifier (e.g., employee ID or name) in the "Rows" section.

  • Crosstab Configuration: Web Intelligence will automatically create columns for each distinct [Phone Type Code], and the corresponding [Phone Number] will be displayed in the appropriate column.

3. Restructuring Data at the Source (Best Long-Term Solution):

The most robust and scalable solution, especially if you anticipate changes in phone types, is to restructure your data at the source (in your database or ETL process).

  • Pivot Data: Pivot your phone data so that each phone type becomes a separate column. This is typically done using SQL queries or data transformation tools.

  • Simplified Report: Once the data is pivoted, your Web Intelligence report becomes much simpler. You can directly add the phone number columns (Home Phone, Mobile Phone, Work Phone) to your report without any complex formulas.

Example (Derived Measures):

Let's say your data looks like this:

Employee ID Phone Number Phone Type Code
1123-456-7890HOME
1987-654-3210MOBILE
2555-123-4567WORK
2111-222-3333HOME
Export to Sheets

After creating the derived measures, your report will look like this:

Employee ID Home Phone Mobile Phone Work Phone
1123-456-7890987-654-3210 
2111-222-3333 555-123-4567
Export to Sheets

Which method should you choose?

  • Derived Measures: Best for a small to moderate number of phone types. Easy to implement within Web Intelligence.
  • Crosstab: Good for a large number of phone types, but might not be ideal for all report layouts.
  • Restructuring at the Source: The best long-term solution for scalability and maintainability, but requires changes to your data source.

I recommend starting with the derived measures approach. If you have a very large number of phone types or if performance becomes an issue, consider restructuring your data at the source.

 

Question: Using the Derived Measure method provided returns a value "#MULTIVALUE". What am I doing wrong?

The #MULTIVALUE error in Web Intelligence means that your formula is trying to return multiple values for a single cell, which isn't allowed. This usually happens when you're using an aggregation function (like SUM, AVG, MAX, MIN) in combination with a condition that doesn't properly group the data.

Here's a breakdown of the problem and the solution in the context of your phone number example:

Problem:

Your derived measures likely look something like this (simplified):

Home Phone = IF [Phone Type Code] = "HOME" THEN [Phone Number] ELSE ""

The issue is that for a single employee, there might be multiple rows where [Phone Type Code] is "HOME" (though ideally, there should only be one). The IF statement returns the [Phone Number] for each of those rows. Since a cell can only hold a single value, Web Intelligence throws the #MULTIVALUE error.

Solution: Ensure Proper Aggregation and Grouping

You need to tell Web Intelligence how to handle the multiple phone numbers if they exist. Most likely, you want to just display one of them (ideally, the only one that should exist). Here are the corrected approaches:

1. Using MAX or MIN (If only one value should exist):

If, logically, each employee should only have one phone number of each type, use MAX or MIN. It doesn't matter which you use as long as the data is correct and there is only one value.

Home Phone = MAX(IF [Phone Type Code] = "HOME" THEN [Phone Number] ELSE "")
Mobile Phone = MAX(IF [Phone Type Code] = "MOBILE" THEN [Phone Number] ELSE "")
Work Phone = MAX(IF [Phone Type Code] = "WORK" THEN [Phone Number] ELSE "")

2. Using FIRST or LAST (If order matters or you want the first/last entered):

If there's a specific order to the phone numbers and you want the first or last one, use FIRST or LAST:

Home Phone = FIRST(IF [Phone Type Code] = "HOME" THEN [Phone Number] ELSE "")
Mobile Phone = LAST(IF [Phone Type Code] = "MOBILE" THEN [Phone Number] ELSE "")

3. Check Your Data (Most Important):

The most important step is to investigate your data. Why are there multiple rows for the same employee and phone type? This indicates a data quality issue that needs to be addressed at the source. Fixing the data is the best long-term solution.

Example (Corrected):

Let's say your (incorrect) data looks like this:

Employee ID Phone Number Phone Type Code
1123-456-7890HOME
1987-654-3210MOBILE
1111-222-3333HOME (Duplicate!)
Export to Sheets

With the corrected formula using MAX:

Home Phone = MAX(IF [Phone Type Code] = "HOME" THEN [Phone Number] ELSE "")

The report will display:

Employee ID Home Phone Mobile Phone
1123-456-7890987-654-3210
Export to Sheets

It will choose the "largest" value. If the phone numbers are all different, this will effectively pick one. Again, the best solution is to remove the duplicate "HOME" phone number for Employee 1 in your source data.

Debugging Tips:

  • Add Employee ID to the Report: Make sure your report includes the [Employee ID] so you can clearly see which employee's data is causing the problem.
  • Filter by Employee: If you're having trouble pinpointing the issue, filter the report to show data for just one employee to see exactly what's happening with their phone numbers.
  • Check Data at the Source: Use a SQL query or data browser to examine the underlying data in your database or universe. This will help you identify the root cause of the duplicate phone numbers.

By using the correct aggregation function (MAX, MIN, FIRST, or LAST) and, most importantly, addressing the underlying data quality issue, you should be able to resolve the #MULTIVALUE error and display the phone numbers correctly.

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Salvador 2025
entry.content:
😃Abertura de Inscrições para Palestrantes - SITSAL 2025 SAP Inside Track Salvador

Prezados(as),

Estamos animados em anunciar que as inscrições para palestrantes para o SITSAL 2025 - SAP Inside Track Salvador estão oficialmente abertas! Este é o momento ideal para compartilhar suas experiências e conhecimentos com uma comunidade engajada e entusiasta.

O evento será uma oportunidade única para se conectar com outros profissionais da área, trocar ideias inovadoras e contribuir para o crescimento da nossa comunidade. Esperamos criar um ambiente inspirador e repleto de aprendizado.

Caso esteja interessado(a) em ser um dos nossos palestrantes, por favor, acesse o link abaixo para se inscrever:

https://www.eventbrite.com.br/e/sap-inside-track-salvador-2025-tickets-1225578902489?aff=oddtdtcreator

Contamos com a sua participação para tornar este evento inesquecível!

entry.title: Re: Static Factory Actions with Deep Parameters don't work
entry.content: Hi Abhishek. The reason I didn't share the behavior implementation is because the issue isn't related to the implementation. The implementation works fine for everything else with deep parameters besides static factory actions. When deep parameters are used the code wouldn't even go into the behavior implementation

entry.title: how to delete an overdue task in successfactors under "For you today"
entry.content:
I have a query
Need to delete an overdue task which has been sitting under "for you today" for past 30+ days.

That task has already been completed on time.

Is there a way that I can get rid of it?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Principal Propagation with F5 load balancer in the landscape
entry.content:
Hi Phil,
I know this is a very old post but did you got any solution for this? I am also trying to connect from BAS on BTP -> Cloud Connector -> F5 LB -> Web Dispatcher -> S/4 or ECC system

entry.title: Re: Live profile view Variable Pay-Enhancement
entry.content:
Hi @rkumar1947 

As per the screenshots you shared with me in a private message you are using the enhanced Variable Pay individual view which does not support custom fields. You need to use the "regular" individual view to be able to show all fields (turn off the checkbox in Actions for all plans > Company settings).

All the best,

Xavier

entry.title: Re: Principal Propagation with F5 load balancer in the landscape
entry.content: Hi Phil, I know this is a very old post but did you got any solution for this? I am also trying to connect from BAS -> Cloud Connector -> F5 LB -> Web Dispatcher -> S/4 or ECC system

entry.title: People Storie positions only of bosses
entry.content:
Hello SAP community, I hope you are doing well.

I wanted to ask you if you have had the experience of how you can create a report in people storie where you can only bring the positions that are higher level, without bringing me on which positions have subordinates. I am currently building a report, but it brings me all the subordinates of the top level position.

I would appreciate if you can share with me some ideas on how I can achieve this since it is a very important report for our organization where we can identify which positions are bosses.

Regards

entry.title: Re: Select query Issue on HANA Cloud Replicated table fro...
entry.content:
found the issue. Its due to case sensitive at 'dbUrl'.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Select query Issue on HANA Cloud Replicated table fro...
entry.content:
Found the Issue. It is due to case sensitive at 'dbUrl'. Its working now.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Stay certified - Is an SAP Learning Hub subscription...
entry.content: Hi, Margit! Thanks for the answers. I'm waiting for my company to renew my SAP Learning Hub subscription, and in the meantime I wanted to access new learning materials (in preparation for the assessment), but I only see old materials from last year for which I already passed the assessment. I would say that this is because I don't have an active Learning HUB subscription or is it something else? In these two links below I only see learning materials for 2024: https://learning.sap.com/courses/sap-s-4hana-cloud-private-edition-sourcing-and-procurement https://learning.sap.com/courses/sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition-implementation-consultant Kind regards, Mihael

entry.title: Re: Fiori Launchpad: SSO made easy by SAML 2.0 with ADFS
entry.content:
Hi @patelyogesh .

Thanks for this post.

Do we have any pre requisite before configuring SAML2?

entry.title: Re: EWA alert for SAP IQ through Solman
entry.content: Just adding: According to Note 1257308 - FAQ: Using EarlyWatch Alert. the optional EWA content (not collected by default) for Business Key Figures and Data Volume Management (see above) reads business related data in the productive client, but collects only aggregated data on the amount of business objects and data volume footprint.  Both of the optional sections are not supported for the SAP IQ connected via DBCO as remote database as 2378876.

entry.title: Re: FSM can be deploy in On Premie releases
entry.content:
Hope you are doing well! 🙂

Please find Help Link for FSM - Feature Scope Description

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_FIELD_SERVICE_MANAGEMENT/fsm_product_information/feature-scope-description.html#feature-scope-description

The SAP Field Service Management solution is a public cloud solution that enables field service organizations of any size to optimize operations, improve field technician utilization, and increase problem resolution on the first visit.

 

Integrations Overview - https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_FIELD_SERVICE_MANAGEMENT/fsm_product_information/feature-scope-description.html#sap-field-service-management-connector-for-sap-erp

 

Hope this helps!

entry.title: Re: adding subreport at runtime
entry.content: Can someone assist? None of the links provided seem to be working anymore. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Incremental Load failing on WFA
entry.content:
Hi @Lola_Alao - the incremental load errored when building the key mapping table for Workforce fact, because of unique constraints violation.  I've checked the configuration on Workforce fact, Performance fact, and Succession - High Potential, specifically the type of fact table, field used as Primary Person ID, and join column on the Key mapping setting.  I don't find any issue with it. 

I am not sure what caused the error.  Below are my suggestions:

  • I've purged the consumer cache in the back-end.  You can try to run incremental load again.
  • The incremental load has been errored since 13 Jan 2025 and there were errors as well between 22 Nov 2024 - 3 Jan 2025.  I think it is best if you run initial load to fully process the data as it may have out of sync.  I think out of sync issue is why you get application error on the front-end site.

If nothing of the above works to solve the issue, please create support ticket so this can be investigated further.  Also, isOlapBackupMode parameter is not turned on for this instance.  I recommend asking support to turn it on (with the help of Engineering).

entry.title: Re: SAP Hana Model Management log Location
entry.content:
Hi,

The error may come from Transaction Notification in Production Environment. You try to turn off them and import again.

Hope this helps,

SonTran

entry.title: Data is not equally distributed in all the partitions
entry.content:
The table data is not equally distributed in all the partitions in BW scale out system. We tried to perform Optimize table partitioning, but the table SAP***./BIC/F*** is not being selected in generated plan.  We did optimize table distribution but this doesn't helped. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Data is not equally distributed in all the partitions
entry.content:
For the table distribution you mentioned, that is recorded in note:

2044468 - FAQ: SAP HANA Partitioning
-> /<bw_prefix>/F<cube_name>

Go to note:
1908075 - SAP BW on SAP HANA: Table Placement and Landscape Redistribution
2334091 - SAP BW/4HANA: Table Placement and Landscape Redistribution

You need review and follow all points mentioned in note for your scenario to perform the Redistribution.

Also this note need to be taken care.
1958216 - Configuration of Landscape Redistribution

entry.title: Re: Confirm produced goods via SOAP API
entry.content:
Hi Simon,

You can use standard web service ManageProductionLotsIn to confirm production data. Please refer to this documentation: https://help.sap.com/doc/a2b4c7ef61d64397b2b1d052082a8a08/2502/en-US/PSM_ISI_R_II_MANAGE_PROD_LOT_IN.html

Henry

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Celebrating 2 Years of the Digital Skills Initiative
entry.content:
Dear David, 

I hope this email finds you well. My name is Dang Nguyen Hai, and I am currently working as a SAP B1 TECHNICAL CONSULTANT / .NET Developer at Lotte Innovate Vietnam. I am writing to express my interest in obtaining a free voucher for the SAP CER01 certification exam.

As a dedicated professional in the SAP ecosystem, I believe that obtaining this certification would significantly enhance my skills and contribute to my career growth. However, due to financial constraints, I find the exam fee to be challenging.

I have thoroughly prepared for the CER01 exam and am eager to demonstrate my competence in SAP technologies. I kindly request your assistance in providing me with a free voucher for this certification.

I have completed the learning journey of Explore Integrated Business Processes in SAP S4/HANA. I have already registered with my email: dangnh@lotte.vn

If there are any additional steps or requirements, please let me know, and I will promptly comply.

Thank you for considering my request. I look forward to your positive response.

 

 

 

 

Thanks and Best regards,

Dang Nguyen Hai.

entry.title: Re: 🇮🇳 SAP CodeJam ABAP: SAP BTP, ABAP Environment & RAP (Chennai, India)
entry.content:
I am interested 

Thanks

entry.title: Process to Handle Damage Goods While Performing Putaway
entry.content:
Damage goods should be properly managed to avoid disruptions and preserve the integrity of the warehouse stock. If goods are found to be damaged after the initial scanning or inspection, warehouse operators can manually update the system to move them to the damaged goods area, ensuring they do not interfere with usable inventory.

Let us see the simple configuration required for doing Putaway process 

  1. Create Separate Stock Type <Z6- Blocked in Warehouse> 
  2. Configure Stock type --> here we assign the Z6 to availability Group which is mapped to Sloc via Node  -->Map Storage Locations from ERP System to EWM

2.Create Separate Storage Type < May be not re-quired but to keep the segregation Clean and efficient can create based on Business decision>

  1. Create Separate Bin under any Storage Type where you want Putaway.

Process Flow:

 Steps:

 

 

  1. Create Purchase Order 
  2. Create Inbound Delivery
  3. Open RFUI ---> Go to Inbound Process

  1. Perform Receiving of  Handling Units 

  1. Receive HU by Delivery ---> Put the Inbound Delivery

  1. Choose the Handling Unit --> Put  or Scan the HU Number

  1. Post Goods Receipt of the Handling Unit

  1. Now Perform Putaway ---> Choose the Exception Code SPPB to Change the Actual Quantity of Putaway

  1. Next Choose the Exception Code CHBD to change the Destination Bin for the Damaged Product 

  1. Atlast check the Stock Situation in the Warehouse 

Benefits :

  • Identifying and marking damaged goods at the time of Putaway ensures that warehouse workers can take corrective actions immediately, such as returning the damaged goods to the supplier, disposing of them, or storing them in a designated damaged goods area.
  • This reduces the risk of unnecessary stock moves or errors during future picking processes, as damaged goods are properly segregated and managed.

entry.title: Re: 🇮🇳 SAP CodeJam ABAP: SAP BTP, ABAP Environment & RAP (Chennai, India)
entry.content: I would like to attend the event. How to register?

entry.title: Must activate scope j58 group ledger during initial scoping
entry.content:
hi SAP experts

I have a question about Public cloud finance J58 group ledger scope , this is not requirement current requirement as customer only have one company and no group reporting requirement

But sap knowledge base and define scope message mentions “this can be added only during initial scoping. If you want to add them after your initial scope has been finalized, your system has to be reprovisioned and your project reimplemented”

 

As customer may or may not have consolidation requirement in future, I don't think possible to reimplement whole ERP solution due to this reason

I would have SAP expert's recommendation that should we always select this J58 group ledger scope.

And what’s the impact about this e.g. system will always post to this ledger, data volume, addtional configuration 

Thanks in Advance

Marco

entry.title: Re: Business Network for Logistics - Freight Collaboration: Understanding the Settlement Process
entry.content:
@SFC 
Incase of Disputes in TM as soon as the carrier submits the invoice it reaches the S4 system and creates a dispute. The dispute communication is done using the dispute case notification and update to FO is done in TM on dispute resolution.

https://help.sap.com/docs/business-network-freight-collaboration/application-help/ordering-party-not-onboarded-on-sap-business-network-for-logistics

@prajwalgangolli 
In case the FSD is created and posted earlier, then after the dispute resolution the updated charges would have to be posted again using the different update strategies.

entry.title: In SAP suddenly for all the customers are started to get the old invoice documents via email
entry.content: In SAP suddenly for all the customers are started to get the old past 3 years old billing invoice documents via email.

entry.title: Re: Backorder Processing in aATP - SAP S4 HANA
entry.content:
Hi @Uma93,

In order to confirm to orders on first come first serve basis you can define either Document Number or Record Creation Date as your prioritize and put the sort order in Ascending within the strategy that you have created. Hope that answers your first question. When it come to the confirmation, as if I understand your requirement, you want to keep existing confirmations and not to touch initial confirmation during next BOP runs. The most ideal strategy that you should use in this case is Strategy Gain, and also if you have set of customers/ requirements that you're okay to redistribute the confirmation to others, put them in the Strategy Redistribute. 

Given the above solution, what it tries to do is, it confirms to requirements which are falling under Gain Strategy in First-Come, First-Serve basis, and remains the confirmation as it is, no matter what the stock situation for other requirements. On the other hand, in case if you get requirements from Premium customer, the requirements which fall under your Redistribute strategy will redistribute their confirmation and confirm to your premium requirements. Hope this helps !

Regards, 

Nipun

entry.title: Re: 🇮🇳 SAP CodeJam ABAP: SAP BTP, ABAP Environment & RAP (Chennai, India)
entry.content:
Hi @KRahul ,

You have to just click on Yes in the section "Will you be attending?". I can see your name in the registered list.

entry.title: Re: Joule speaks ABAP!
entry.content:
As of now it does not work with BTP Trial account for ABAP development.

Its a shame, as github copilot already works with abap and eclipse without need for complicated licenses. The autocomplete works with abap with github copilot but it is not aware of context and code in related objects so it is limited.

I hope Joule can mitigate that, but as we know SAP moves slow, so it would be a while when developers will have access to it for learning

entry.title: Message No. KT299
entry.content: How do i solve this error message: Differing charts of accounts: INT - ZAB2 Message No. KT299

entry.title: Is it possible to combine multiple Purchase requisitions from different users into a single PO
entry.content:
Is it possible to combine multiple Purchase requisitions from different users into a single PO based on supplier , company code and delivery location  in SAP Ariba Buying and invoicing solution ? For example if there are multiple orders of a particular laptop from the same supplier and the delivery location is also same, we would like to combine the PRs into a single PO so that the delivery cost and carbon emission can be reduced. 

 

Regards,

Saurav Agarwal

SAP Ariba Buying and Invoicing

entry.title: Re: Eligibility Rules not applied to Compensation Profile
entry.content: @rebeccanussba Is it a standalone EC integrated Variable Pay template or the Variable Pay tab of a Total Compensation template ? I am not able to grey only one column in a Variable Pay template hence my question... The feature to define Column level eligibility is only supported in Compensation. Maybe you can share a recording of the configuration where you walk us through the column in Design worksheet and the eligibility rule ? This way I can try to replicate. Thank you

entry.title: Re: Must activate scope j58 group ledger during initial s...
entry.content:
Dear,

Group ledger set-up is not only for Group reporting and consolidation scenarios.

it would be very useful , for example, if the corporation has or will have subsidiaries overseas, which will need to be adherence to their respective local accounting practice.

with multiple ledgers setup and universal parallel  accounting concept in public cloud, the impacts are big, fixed asset accounting, inventory accounting, production accounting, overhead accounting etc. all these postings can be done in parallel for each ledger

please also refer below links.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition: Options for Acc... - SAP Community

Ledger Scenarios: Choosing the Right Combination for Your Business Needs | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: Exchange Rate Source for Journal Entries in Foreign C...
entry.content:
Dear,

please try different filer conditions for exchange rate app.

perhaps, the validity date is very early in the past.

entry.title: Re: Special GL indicators missing when using Fiori F0773
entry.content:
Dear

The Special GL indicators from Fiori app Clear Incoming Payments (F0773),are the intended list to be used in this app.

other special GL indicators, such as bill of exchange, down-payment, there's dedicated processes to handle them.

Regards,

Sen

entry.title: Re: where to create new Relative DATE FUNCTION
entry.content:
Dear @Sandra_Rossi,

We can use the Fiori app "Manage Date functions", to create a new date functions if required.

Check the below link 
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/6b356c79dea443c4bbeeaf0865e04207/6164ef91c48240d4959b63fe205aec3f.html

Hope this helps!!!

Best regards,
Surya.

entry.title: Re: SAP Note 0001961783 request
entry.content:
Hi,
KBA 1961783 was archived.
Here is a good place to start when scanning for potential problems in the iqmsg log:

cxx
ErrID
Exception
STACKTRACE
s_bufman
st_server
SigHndlr
Warning
Severity
Fail
"Not enough"
Suspect
Corrupt
Critical
Infect
Error
Problem
Unable
"Not valid"
Invalid
Stacktrace
^E\.
TRASH

Hope this helps.

entry.title: Re: What is the added value to hide email & phone number in New People Profile > Spotlight ?
entry.content: We raised it with SAP and apparently its a standard system behaviour.

entry.title: Object Development for Side by side Extension
entry.content:
Hello experts,

As far as I know , there are plenty of extensibility types for SAP.

For example, in-app extensibility and side-by-side extensibility.

https://sapzero2hero.com/2023/09/19/sap-s-4hana-cloud-developer-extensibility-in-s-4-hana-cloud/

 

Before side-by-side extensibility showed up, we used RICEFW to kind of categorize the objects needed for development.

However, when it comes to side by side extension, does the same categories apply?


For me, side by side extensibility (using BTP) is like a totally different world compared to extension within S4.
How do you usually categorize the objects needed for development in this case?

 

Thank you.

 

Wei-Hsin, Kuo

entry.title: SAPUI5 odata v4 filtering on property of associated entity
entry.content:
I am using odata v4 have to do filtering on a property in associated entity and url is as below.

Product$count=true&$expand=_ProductDescription($select=ProductDescription),_ProductPlant($select=Plant;$filter=Plant eq '1710')

Product is the entity and _ProductDescription, _ProductPlant are associated entities and filtering is required on plant which is property of _ProductPlant

I have tried as below but its not working and expecting in the format of _ProductPlant($select=Plant;$filter=Plant eq '1710'). What is the filter syntax in sapui5 code for this...

new Filter("_ProductPlant/Plant", FilterOperator.EQ, 1710))

entry.title: Re: Consuming external services(Odata/Rest) using destinations configured in BTP cockpit.
entry.content: @anastasiia12 , I am glad to hear that it was helpful for you 🙂

entry.title: Re: パートナーデモ環境でJouleを有効化してみる
entry.content:
@Mino 

失礼しました、すでに同期済みだったのですね。

私もRead Jobまで実行してみましたが、タイムアウトエラーになっていましました（OSS問い合わせ済み）。進展がありましたら共有します。

Cannot execute provisioning job in tenant context: xxx
Caused by: Error during execution on behalf of tenant with ID: xxx
Caused by: Can not read entities from source system: 'Joule Source S4HANA Cloud: e8d8df4e-ce1f-4616-817e-0edf61ee8106' 
Caused by: org.apache.cxf.interceptor.Fault: Could not receive Message. 
Caused by: Could not receive Message. 
Caused by: Timeout exception occurred 
Caused by: Timeout exception occurred

entry.title: Re: Question: How to restrict access to EnableNow in rega...
entry.content: This could be done via Single Sign-On configuration. You can create a group in you corporate Identity provider (e.g. MS Entra ID) and assign this group to the SAP Enable Now application, so that only users who are members of this group can access SAP Enable Now.

entry.title: Re: SAP CLOUD PUBLIC advances catalog effectively used
entry.content:
Hi @ctourte 

It is not possible to track if any Advanced Business Role Price Category are used by assinged business users. 

In Monitoring and Analysis, we have some apps available to check the following, but not able to check the exact log for monitoring the usage of Advanced Business Role Price Category.

  • Find business users with unnecessarily high privileges (for example, too many admin users)
    Find business users with unnecessary or critical authorization combinations (the result of privilege creep)
    Find business roles granting access to data too generously (that is, having unmaintained restrictions)
    Analyze the root cause for authorization errors

Best regards,

Irene

entry.title: Deprecation of Legacy org chart and Profile preview and spotlight becoming universal
entry.content:
Hi All

Can someone please confirm if customers need to migrate to Latest org chart in H1 2025 which comes along with Profile preview and spotlight?

Is the latest org chart, spotlight and profile preview becoming universal in H1 2025? The help.com link says that the legacy org chart will be deleted in Nov 2025 which means the latest one should go universal in H2 2025 right?

SAP are saying the spotlight and profile preview will be universal in H1 2025. Don't both these features come as part of latest org chart which has a deletion date of Nov 2025? Quiet confused as to when the latest org chart will become universal along with spotlight and profile preview

SAP links are here: 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_RELEASE_INFORMATION/8e0d540f96474717bbf18df51e54e522/239ca4e239ef48378073693a2a18167c.html?locale=en-US&parentHref=%2Fwhats-new%2F8fcf4960eea24f78b1d7613da406a885%3FProduct%3DPlatform%26Version%3D1H%25202024%26locale%3Den-US%23top&parentName=SAP%20SuccessFactors%20What%27s%20New

If someone has clarity, please shed some light

Regards

Mahwish

entry.title: Re: Export File Issue in SAC
entry.content: Yes, the file system is deprecated. However, the option you suggested regarding Content Network Storage works for exporting or importing data both within the same tenant and across tenants. That said, if someone intends to take a backup at the OS level, it will primarily capture the model structure. Specifically, for imported models (whether sourced from CSV or other sources), the data itself will not appear upon re-importing. In such cases, you would either need to re-import the CSV file or schedule a data import job. please confirm

entry.title: Re: Reimagining digital learning as an integrated part of a Digital Adoption Platform with SAP &&&&
entry.content:
Hi @KristinaKunad 

Great blog, really informative.

I understand it is still work in progress however, do you have any sort of timeline of when migration options to move from SAP Enable Now (SEN) to Walk Me will be available? We currently use SEN across our organisation and have a global project ongoing where Walk Me would be great to use.

Thanks in advance

Scott

entry.title: Is there a way to detect whether a BAPI is for read or write through metadata?
entry.content:
Hi all,

Is there any bapi attribute or any other details in the BAPI metadata that can be used to determine if the BAPI is for read or write?

BAPI_USER_GETLIST - reads list of all users - so a read bapi

BAPI_PO_CREATE1 - creates a purchase order - so a write bapi

BAPI_USER_LOCK - changes state of a user to locked - a write bapi

Note: NWRFCSDK is being used for fetching BAPI metadata and other details

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: 🇮🇳 SAP CodeJam ABAP: SAP BTP, ABAP Environment & RAP (Chennai, India)
entry.content: I am attending

entry.title: Re: SAP IBP Adjusted Transport Supply is not getting fulf...
entry.content:
Hi Daniel,

I am still testing the optimizer by assigning very high Inventory Holding Cost IHC for those locations that should not keep inventory for current week (no safety stock). However, some SKUs are still retaining the inventory and system is opting to supply the remaining inventory to future weeks. 

In case I achieve the expected results for this latest run, I know I am may still encounter it next time because the Demand requirement and Inventories are variable and will affect the result.

Thanks, 

J

entry.title: Re: パートナーデモ環境でJouleを有効化してみる
entry.content:
@Mino 

同期されたロールの確認方法について、すでにご存じかもしれませんがSettings > Identity Provisioning からユーザID（メールアドレス）を入力すると、IPS経由で割り当たったロールが見られます。

entry.title: Re: Message No. KT299
entry.content:
Hi @RogerK 

Please check whether the chart of accounts assigned to the company code and controlling area is same or not.

entry.content: Congratulations SAP for winning this prestigeous Award

entry.title: Re: can SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition be set to be Sin...
entry.content:
Hi @omega-ou 

Could you please check SAP Help Portal - Configuring Tenant Settings -> Configure IdP-Initiated SSO.

Hope this document help.

Best regards,

Irene

entry.title: Re: Item XXXX: Subitem 100 is not in maximum selection S-...
entry.content:
Please check the Breakdown Category assigned to your FS Item 102224.
In that Breakdown Category, you have restriction on the usage of SubItems with selection S-BC-TT-11.
Please check this selection for list of SubItems allowed. If SubItem 100 is not in this list, system gives you a validation error.

You can either update this selection to include this subitem or update a different breakdown category to that FS Item or reclass the source line using manual journal to a correct SubItem using a document type under Posting level 0C.

entry.title: Add the custom fields in WBS element in S/4HANA public cloud
entry.content:
Is there any option to create Custom Fields in Wbs element in S/4HANA public cloud


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Add the custom fields in WBS element in S/4HANA publi...
entry.content:
With the Custom Fields app, you can create and maintain custom fields that you can use to enhance applications.

You can create custom fields using the business context Project Element, enable usage of these fields for the WBS Element app (data source WBS Element Extensibility Model) in the User Interfaces section of custom field maintenance, and publish your custom fields. 

Please find the below SAP Documentation for the same

App Extensibility: WBS Element

entry.title: Re: SAP IBP Adjusted Transport Supply is not getting fulf...
entry.content: Hi Carsten, I have raised this concern to the support and we are currently checking on this. One of the factors they mentioned as well is the cost model.

Lothar

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to change the name of performa invoice ?
entry.content:
Hi,
on the form you can name the document what ever you want 🙂

It is just a text.

I know this problem, but Proforma invoice in SAP is only a technical term, not corresponding with the legal term in customs.

 

Kind regards

Robert

entry.title: Re: error when trying to connect to public cloud connecti...
